entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its pollination characteristics and out-crossing rates

entities.name: WRAPPED FLOWER
entities.description: A morphological flower character reported to inhibit out-crossing in certain regions

entities.name: OUT-CROSSING
entities.description: The process of cross-fertilization between different plants of the same species

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The region where wrapped flowers were previously reported to inhibit out-crossing in pigeonpea

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research facility where the study on out-crossing in wrapped flower lines was conducted

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city in India where the ICRISAT Center is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT Center is located

entities.name: NORMAL FLOWER
entities.description: The standard unwrapped flower morphology of pigeonpea used as a comparison
